transcription.observations: Student is exceeding his 80% independence goal. Step 7 (identified as the 'Wipe step') is the primary area for growth, requiring verbal prompts (VP) in 3 out of 7 sessions. A visual aid 'Bingo does a full check!' is being used to support this specific step. Marcus shows a positive trend toward full independence, achieving 9/9 on 4 of the 7 tracked sessions by the end of the week.

matched_goals.reasoning: The transcription is a direct data log of Marcus's bathroom routine across 7 sessions. The goal requires the routine to be completed with no more than 1 verbal prompt. In 6 out of 7 sessions (Mon 11:15, Tue 9:45, Wed 9:30, Thu 9:30, Fri 9:45, Fri 1:45), Marcus required 1 or 0 prompts. Only the Mon 9:30 session (2 prompts) failed the criteria.

analyses.progress_note: Marcus has shown exceptional progress in his toileting routine, moving from a 20% baseline to a recent performance of 86%. He is now consistently meeting his goal of completing the routine with one or fewer prompts, a huge win! This success is closely linked to the implementation of Bluey-themed motivators, sensory adjustments (warm water), and the adapted wipe holder recommended by the OT, which helped him overcome motor planning challenges.
analyses.recommended_next_steps: Since Marcus has now reached the target of 80% in his most recent trials, we should begin fading the Bluey visual sequence cards to ensure he can maintain independence without prompts. We also recommend generalizing this skill by practicing the routine in a different school bathroom to ensure the skill is stable across settings.
